items.headline_ai: Portman Ridge reports Q2 2025 NII $0.50, closes Logan Ridge merger, declares $0.47 distribution
items.snippet: Portman Ridge posted Q2 2025 NII of $0.50/share and closed its merger with Logan Ridge on July 15, 2025, creating a combined entity with over $600 million in total assets.

items.title: 8-K — Acquisition or Disposition · Material Off-Balance-Sheet Obligation · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Portman Ridge closes Logan Ridge merger, combined total assets exceed $600M
items.snippet: Portman Ridge completed its merger with Logan Ridge Finance Corporation effective July 15, 2025, creating a combined company with total assets in excess of $600 million.

items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Portman Ridge shareholders approve merger with Logan Ridge Finance
items.snippet: Portman Ridge Finance obtained shareholder approval for the stock issuance tied to its merger with Logan Ridge Finance Corporation.

items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote
8-K — Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: ISS and Glass Lewis both recommend PTMN and LRFC shareholders vote for merger
items.snippet: Both ISS and Glass Lewis issued reports recommending shareholders of both Portman Ridge and Logan Ridge vote in favor of the proposed merger at their June 6, 2025 special meetings.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Portman Ridge reports Q1 2025 NII of $0.47/share, NAV $18.85, declares $0.47 Q2 distribution
items.snippet: Portman Ridge posted Q1 2025 NII of $0.47/share with NAV of $18.85/share, and declared a $0.47 quarterly distribution for Q2 2025.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Portman Ridge reports Q4 2024 NII, full-year NII $2.59/share, introduces $0.07 supplemental distribution
items.snippet: Portman Ridge posted full-year 2024 NII of $2.59/share and NAV of $19.41/share, declaring a $0.47 base plus new $0.07 supplemental for Q1 2025.

items.snippet: Portman Ridge posted Q3 2024 NII of $0.63/share with NAV of $20.36/share and declared a $0.69 quarterly distribution for Q4 2024.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Portman Ridge reports Q2 2024 NII $0.70, NAV $21.21, upsizes credit facility to $200M
items.snippet: Portman Ridge posted Q2 2024 NII of $0.70/share with NAV of $21.21/share, and amended its credit facility to $200 million at 2.50% margin.

items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Material Off-Balance-Sheet Obligation · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Portman Ridge upsizes revolving credit facility to $200M, cuts margin to 2.50% from 2.80%
items.snippet: Portman Ridge amended its JPMorgan credit facility, increasing commitments to $200 million from $115 million, reducing the margin 30 bps, and extending maturity to August 2027.

items.snippet: Portman Ridge posted full-year 2023 NII of $3.66/share with total investment income up 9.6% to $76.3 million, and declared a $0.69 quarterly distribution for Q1 2024.

items.snippet: Portman Ridge declared a $0.69 quarterly distribution for Q4 2023, a 7.4% increase versus full-year 2022, with Q3 2023 total investment income at $18.6 million.

items.snippet: Portman Ridge increased its Q3 2023 quarterly distribution to $0.69/share from $0.63 in Q3 2022, with Q2 2023 total investment income at $19.6 million.

items.snippet: Portman Ridge posted Q1 2022 NAV of $28.76/share and refinanced its JPMorgan credit facility, maintaining its $0.63 quarterly distribution.

items.headline_ai: Portman Ridge completes 1-for-10 reverse stock split effective August 26, 2021
items.snippet: Portman Ridge's 1-for-10 reverse stock split became effective August 26, 2021, with trading on Nasdaq continuing under symbol PTMN with a new CUSIP.

items.title: 8-K — Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Portman Ridge sets August 26, 2021 effective date for 1-for-10 reverse stock split
items.snippet: Portman Ridge announced its 1-for-10 reverse stock split will take effect August 26, 2021, with split-adjusted trading beginning that day on Nasdaq.

items.headline_ai: Portman Ridge closes $28M private placement of 4.875% senior notes due 2026
items.snippet: Portman Ridge closed a $28 million add-on private placement of 4.875% senior unsecured notes due April 30, 2026, with proceeds used to redeem 6.125% notes due 2022.

items.snippet: Portman Ridge completed its merger with Harvest Capital Credit on June 9, 2021, creating a combined entity with approximately $614 million in total assets.

items.headline_ai: Portman Ridge closes $80M private placement of 4.875% senior notes due 2026
items.snippet: Portman Ridge closed an $80 million private placement of 4.875% senior unsecured notes due April 30, 2026, rated BBB- by Egan-Jones, with proceeds to redeem 6.125% notes.

items.headline_ai: Portman Ridge names Jason Roos CFO effective March 1 as Ted Gilpin retires
items.snippet: Portman Ridge appointed Jason T. Roos to succeed retiring CFO Ted Gilpin effective March 1, 2021.

items.headline_ai: Harvest Capital agrees to merge into Portman Ridge, combined entity managed by BC Partners
items.snippet: Harvest Capital Credit and Portman Ridge entered into a definitive merger agreement under which HCAP will merge into PTMN, to be managed by a BC Partners affiliate.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Portman Ridge reports Q3 2020 NII of $0.06/share as Garrison Capital merger awaits closing
items.snippet: Portman Ridge posted Q3 2020 NII of $0.06/share with NAV of $2.85/share, up 5% sequentially, ahead of the Garrison merger closing on October 28, 2020.

items.title: 8-K — Acquisition or Disposition · Officer / Director Departure or Appointment · Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Portman Ridge closes Garrison Capital merger, third transaction in two years, combined assets ~$638M
items.snippet: Portman Ridge closed its merger with Garrison Capital on October 28, 2020, creating a combined entity with approximately $638 million in total assets.

items.title: 8-K — Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Portman Ridge declares $0.06/share distribution for Q3 2020 ahead of Garrison merger closing
items.snippet: Portman Ridge declared a $0.06/share distribution for Q3 2020, payable November 27, 2020, ahead of the pending Garrison Capital merger.

items.headline_ai: Portman Ridge provides COVID-19 stakeholder update, affirms business continuity
items.snippet: Portman Ridge issued a COVID-19 update assuring stakeholders of full business continuity and ongoing support for portfolio companies amid pandemic-driven market dislocation.

items.title: 8-K — Regulation FD Disclosure · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Portman Ridge declares $0.06/share distribution payable May 27, 2020
items.snippet: Portman Ridge's board declared a $0.06/share cash distribution payable May 27, 2020, in line with its current dividend policy.

items.title: 8-K — Results of Operations · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Portman Ridge reports full-year 2019 NII of $0.08/share, board authorizes $10M stock buyback
items.snippet: Portman Ridge reported 2019 NII of $0.08/share following the OHA Investment merger and launched a $10 million stock repurchase program approved March 5, 2020.

items.headline_ai: Portman Ridge declares $0.06/share distribution payable February 28, 2020
items.snippet: Portman Ridge's board approved a $0.06/share cash distribution payable February 28, 2020 to shareholders of record February 18, 2020.
